title: MALACASA Casserole Dishes for the Oven, 440ML 4.8" Small Porcelain Ramekins with Handle and Lid, White Mini Cocotte of 4, Ceramic Dutch Oven Set for Lasagna, Soufflé, Soup, Oven Proof Bakeware
features: 【MINI COCOTTE SET】MALACASA ceramic small casserole dishes include 4 mini casseroles, each with a generous capacity of up to 440ML and measuring 4.8" x 2.1", perfect for individual servings. These mini casseroles dish are versatile and can be used to make lasagna, caramel pudding, omelets, jams, custard pies, fruits, French onion soup, puddings, or any baked goods. Whether you're dining alone or with your family, MALACASA casseroles dishes are your great choice.

【SMALL CASSEROLE DISH with LID】Our small baking dish comes with lids to prevent spills and retain heat for easy storage. No more concerns about dust on leftovers. Perfect for transporting soups from the kitchen to the table, keeping them hot. The covered dishes also preserve leftovers in the fridge without compromising taste.

【STURDY HANDLE DESIGN】Our small casserole dishes feature sturdy handles with a comfortable grip. This design ensures weight balance and prevents your hands from touching hot surfaces while handling hot dishes. Whether you're removing them from the microwave or placing them in the oven, it's effortless to handle. This user-friendly design significantly reduces the risk of burns when using the microwave or oven, providing you with a safe and convenient cooking experience.

【DURABLE CERAMIC BAKING DISH】MALACASA ceramic casserole dish for oven are made from high-quality lead-free and non-toxic ceramic material, ensuring durability and withstanding extreme temperatures up to 464°F in the oven. MALACASA small oven safe casserole dishes is suitable for use in the oven, microwave, and dishwasher.

【EASY TO CLEAN AND STORE】The surface of this small oven safe baking dish is smooth, making it easy for food to release and clean. This set of mini casseroles can be stacked, making storage and organization in the kitchen cabinet convenient.
【12 MONTH WARRANTY & CUSTOMER SERVICE】Your purchase is guaranteed by our 12-month warranty for against manufacturer defects. Please feel free to contact our customer service first for any questions.
